basic_details.job_title: NERAMAC Assistant General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Regional Agricultural Marketing Corporation (NERAMAC)
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Regional Agricultural Marketing Corporation (NERAMAC) Assistant General Manager - Marketing Notification 2026 has been released on 13 July 2026 on the official website neramac.com. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NERAMAC Assistant General Manager - Marketing Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years as on 01-08-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA/ PGDM in Marketing/Agribusiness Management from any Govt. recognized University.
qualification.details: Assistant General Manager - Marketing: MBA/ PGDM in Marketing/Agribusiness Management from any Govt. recognized University.

salary_details.details: Assistant General Manager - Marketing: Rs. 80000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NERAMAC Assistant General Manager - Marketing Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.neramac.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NERAMAC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NERAMAC Assistant General Manager - Marketing Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.neramac.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NERAMAC Assistant General Manager - Marketing Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NERAMAC Assistant General Manager - Marketing Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the NERAMAC Assistant General Manager - Marketing Recruitment 2026 is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant General Manager - Marketing post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Assistant General Manager - Marketing post is an MBA/ PGDM in Marketing/Agribusiness Management from any Government-recognized University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Assistant General Manager - Marketing post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant General Manager - Marketing post is 45 years as on 1st August 2026. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant General Manager - Marketing position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Assistant General Manager - Marketing position will receive a salary of Rs. 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant General Manager - Marketing post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant General Manager - Marketing post in the North Eastern Regional Agricultural Marketing Corporation (NERAMAC) recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for NERAMAC Assistant General Manager - Marketing Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NERAMAC Assistant General Manager - Marketing Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant General Manager - Marketing post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Assistant General Manager - Marketing post will include an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of NERAMAC, which is www.neramac.com.

faq.question: Q10. What documents need to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with the application form.
